title: Miracle-Gro Fast Green Lawn Food Concentrated Liquid, 1 litre concentrate, 100 m² coverage
features: For a richer, greener lawn in just 24 hours which lasts up to 6 weeks!
Perfect for smaller urban gardens, larger gardens with small lawns, front lawns and for those households that don’t own a hosepipe
Use anytime between March and September
Lawn coverage of up to 100 m²
description: From the manufacturer Previous page Get a greener lawn in just 24 hours! Gives your lawn a richer, greener colour in just 24 hours and will feed grass for up to 6 weeks. Stronger roots Formulated with added iron supplement that helps build a thick lawn with stronger roots. Pet and child friendly Children and pets can use the lawn once the product has been watered in and dried. Next page 1 Greener Lawn In 24 Hours 2 Stronger Roots 3 Pet & Child Friendly Specially formulated to give you a beautiful green lawn in just 24 hours Dual action lawn food with iron supplement that will give your lawn a richer, greener colour in just 24 hours under normal growing conditions and will feed grass for up to 6 weeks. Apply from early spring until the autumn to make your lawn more resistant to drought and other stresses, ready to absorb water and nutrients better than ever before. Bottle made from 50% recycled material. Why should I use Miracle-Gro Fast Green Liquid Lawn Food? Miracle-Gro Fast Green Liquid Lawn Food gives a superior deeper greening in just 24 hours. It is a dual action lawn food with added iron supplement and helps build a thick lawn with stronger roots. Children and pet friendly. When should I use Miracle-Gro Fast Green Liquid Lawn Food? Use from March to September. Apply when the weather is fair, the soil is damp, and grass is dry and frost-free. Do not apply on a lawn less than 6 months old. Reapply the product after a minimum of 6 weeks if needed. How do I use Miracle-Gro Fast Green Liquid Lawn Food? Use measuring cap provided. Shake well before use. Fit a watering can with a fine rose or sprinkle bar. Mix 40ml of product in 4 litres of water, apply this evenly over 4m². Or mix 100ml of product in 10 litres of water, apply this evenly over 10m². When can children and pets return to a lawn treated with Miracle-Gro Fast Green Liquid Lawn Food? Children and pets need not be kept out of the treated area once it has dried.
